name: Harriet Voss's Office
description: A small room behind the ticket window, orderly to the point of severity — the desk holds a logbook, a brass lamp, and a locked drawer that Harriet's hand moves toward when she is nervous.
atmosphericDetails: The logbook is open to tonight's entry — the last notation is at 11:22 PM and records nothing unusual.
A faint smell of machine oil that does not belong to any visible equipment in the room.
The locked drawer has a small scratch on its face near the keyhole, as if something was recently forced or hurriedly inserted.
